L1_headline: + SEM – Martin F. Jackson disposed 29,460 shares (tax withholding). | 08/01/25
L2_brief: Executive Vice President Martin F. Jackson disposed of 29,460 shares of common stock at $12.57 per share on August 1, 2025, totaling approximately $370,313. This was a mandatory surrender of shares to cover tax withholding obligations upon vesting of restricted stock, not a discretionary sale, and therefore does not signal bearish sentiment.

L3_detailed.pattern_notes: Transaction code 'F' indicates this was a mandatory tax withholding disposition upon restricted stock vesting, not a voluntary sale. The insider retains substantial holdings of over 1.39 million shares, demonstrating continued significant alignment with shareholders.
risks_flagged: Transaction was mandatory tax withholding (Code F), not discretionary selling
